input_text: Kerajaan cakap nak bantu rakyat tapi projek mega masih jalan. Prioriti salah ni.
reason: Frustrated criticism of government spending priorities, populist sentiment.
suggested_rewrite: Peruntukan belanjawan perlu mengimbangi projek infrastruktur dengan keperluan rakyat. Ketelusan dalam keutamaan perbelanjaan penting.

input_text: The food court hygiene is terrible. I saw a rat running across the floor. These operators don't care about customers at all.
reason: Harsh food court hygiene complaint with sweeping generalization about operators.
suggested_rewrite: I witnessed a hygiene issue at the food court that should be reported to the local health department for inspection.

input_text: 公共厕所又脏又臭，管理费都去哪里了？这些人根本不做事。
reason: Frustrated public toilet cleanliness complaint questioning management accountability.
suggested_rewrite: 公共厕所的卫生状况需要改善。居民可以向管理委员会要求查看清洁维护记录。

input_text: இந்த பகுதியில் தண்ணீர் வெட்டு அடிக்கடி நடக்கிறது. அரசாங்கத்திற்கு மக்கள் மீது அக்கறை இல்லை.
reason: Frustrated about frequent water cuts, accusing government of not caring about people.
suggested_rewrite: அடிக்கடி ஏற்படும் நீர் வெட்டு மக்களை பாதிக்கிறது. நீர் வழங்கல் அமைப்பின் மேம்படுத்தல் தேவை.

input_text: Parking kat KL memang rompak. RM20 sejam tu gila ke apa? Memang nak perah duit orang je.
reason: Frustrated about high parking costs in KL, using strong language about being robbed.
suggested_rewrite: Kadar parking di KL yang tinggi membebankan pengguna. DBKL boleh mempertimbangkan kadar berperingkat yang lebih berpatutan.

input_text: This condo management is useless. Lift broken for two weeks and nobody fixes it. Old people have to climb stairs.
reason: Frustrated condo management complaint about broken lift affecting elderly residents.
suggested_rewrite: The lift has been out of service for two weeks, causing hardship for elderly residents. I'll escalate this to the Joint Management Body formally.

input_text: 每次去政府部门办事都要排队几个小时。效率太低了，都什么年代了还不能网上办理。
reason: Frustrated about long queues at government offices and lack of digital services.
suggested_rewrite: 政府部门的数字化转型可以减少排队时间。许多服务应该提供在线办理选项。

input_text: Jalan kat kampung ni dah berlubang sana sini tapi wakil rakyat tak nampak pun. Masa election je muncul.
reason: Frustrated about neglected rural roads and politicians only appearing during elections.
suggested_rewrite: Penyelenggaraan jalan luar bandar perlu perhatian berterusan. Penduduk boleh membuat aduan rasmi kepada JKR untuk tindakan.

input_text: The grab driver was so rude, scolding me for the pickup location. These drivers think they're doing us a favour.
reason: Frustrated ride-hailing complaint generalizing about driver rudeness.
suggested_rewrite: I had a negative experience with a ride-hailing driver's attitude. I'll rate the trip accordingly and provide specific feedback through the app.

input_text: Wifi kat Malaysia ni slow gila compared to Singapore. Bayar mahal tapi speed macam siput. Telco semua sama je, rompak.
reason: Comparing Malaysian internet unfavorably to Singapore, accusing all telcos of robbery.
suggested_rewrite: Broadband speeds in Malaysia still lag behind regional competitors. MCMC should enforce minimum speed guarantees and encourage healthy competition among telcos.

input_text: Dah la bayar cukai banyak tapi jalan raya pun tak maintain. Duit rakyat pergi mana?
reason: Tax frustration questioning where public funds go when roads are poorly maintained.
suggested_rewrite: Rakyat berhak mengetahui bagaimana cukai digunakan. Akauntabiliti dan ketelusan dalam perbelanjaan awam perlu ditingkatkan.

input_text: The clinic always runs out of medicine. What's the point of going there if they can't even stock basic supplies?
reason: Frustrated about government clinic medicine shortages, questioning its purpose.
suggested_rewrite: Government clinics should have consistent medicine supplies. If stock issues persist, patients can report to the Ministry of Health hotline.

input_text: 政府说要解决交通堵塞问题，但年年都一样。根本就是空话连篇。
reason: Cynicism about government traffic solutions being empty promises year after year.
suggested_rewrite: 交通拥堵需要长期解决方案。政府应该设定可衡量的改善目标并定期向公众汇报进展。

input_text: இங்கு பேருந்து நேரத்திற்கு வருவதே இல்லை. ஒரு நாளும் சரியாக வராது.
reason: Frustrated about buses never being on time, public transport reliability complaint.
suggested_rewrite: பேருந்து நேரம் தவறாமை பயணிகளை பாதிக்கிறது. நிகழ்நேர பேருந்து கண்காணிப்பு அமைப்பு இதை மேம்படுத்தும்.

input_text: Nak makan kat mamak pun dah mahal sekarang. Roti canai dah RM2. Zaman dulu 50 sen je. Gila betul.
reason: Nostalgic frustration about mamak food price increases, cost of living anxiety.
suggested_rewrite: Kenaikan harga makanan memberi kesan kepada semua rakyat. Kerajaan perlu memastikan harga barang keperluan kekal berpatutan.

input_text: Malaysia's education system produces robots, not thinkers. No wonder we keep losing talent to other countries.
reason: Harsh criticism of education system with brain drain concern, disparaging tone.
suggested_rewrite: Malaysia's education system could benefit from more emphasis on critical thinking and creativity to retain homegrown talent.

input_text: 这些外卖骑手在人行道上横冲直撞，完全不顾行人安全。出事了谁负责？
reason: Safety complaint about delivery riders on sidewalks endangering pedestrians.
suggested_rewrite: 外卖骑手在人行道上骑行确实存在安全隐患。需要更明确的规定和执法来保障行人安全。

input_text: Setiap kali complaint pasal sampah haram, jawapan sama je - 'akan diambil tindakan'. Tapi takde apa pun berubah.
reason: Frustrated about ignored illegal dumping complaints with standard bureaucratic responses.
suggested_rewrite: Aduan tentang pembuangan sampah haram perlu tindakan susulan yang jelas. Sistem aduan bersama nombor rujukan boleh membantu memantau tindakan.

input_text: Government servants always on their phone during working hours. No wonder service so slow. Zero work ethic.
reason: Sweeping generalization about government employees' work ethic, stereotyping.
suggested_rewrite: Service efficiency at government counters could be improved with better performance monitoring and customer feedback systems.

input_text: 这个市场的鱼贩每次都给我不新鲜的鱼。问他还生气。这种态度怎么做生意？
reason: Frustrated market vendor complaint about product quality and rude attitude.
suggested_rewrite: 消费者有权获得新鲜商品和礼貌服务。如果不满意，可以换一家购买或向市场管理处反映。

input_text: Bus sekolah pun dah naik harga. Semua benda naik harga tapi quality sama je, kadang lagi teruk.
reason: Cost of living frustration about school bus fee increases without quality improvement.
suggested_rewrite: Kenaikan tambang bas sekolah perlu disertai peningkatan keselamatan dan keselesaan. Ibu bapa boleh berunding dengan pengendali bas melalui PIBG.

input_text: Every time election comes, politicians promise the sky. After winning, disappear. Malaysian politics is a joke.
reason: Cynical dismissal of Malaysian politics as a joke, disillusionment with electoral promises.
suggested_rewrite: Accountability for election promises should be tracked systematically. Voters can hold representatives accountable through town halls and public feedback sessions.

input_text: மருத்துவமனையில் மொழி பிரச்சனை உள்ளது. தமிழில் பேசினால் புரியாது என்று சொல்கிறார்கள்.
reason: Frustrated about language barriers at hospitals for Tamil-speaking patients.
suggested_rewrite: மருத்துவமனைகளில் மொழிபெயர்ப்பு சேவைகள் அனைத்து நோயாளிகளுக்கும் சிகிச்சையை மேம்படுத்தும்.

input_text: Minyak masak pun nak kena beratur beli. Macam zaman perang pulak. Kerajaan tak reti urus.
reason: Frustrated about cooking oil rationing, comparing to wartime and criticizing government.
suggested_rewrite: Bekalan minyak masak perlu diperbaiki supaya rakyat tidak perlu beratur. Kerajaan boleh meningkatkan pengeluaran subsidi dan pengedaran.

input_text: These developers build condos with paper-thin walls. Can hear everything from neighbors. Zero quality control.
reason: Construction quality complaint about thin walls and noise, frustrated homeowner.
suggested_rewrite: Soundproofing standards in new developments need to be improved. Buyers can file complaints under the defect liability period for substandard construction.

input_text: 银行的客服电话永远打不通。每次都要等半个小时以上。这是什么服务水平？
reason: Frustrated about long wait times on bank customer service hotlines.
suggested_rewrite: 银行客服等待时间过长影响客户体验。银行应增加客服人员或改善在线自助服务功能。

input_text: Sungai kat belakang rumah ni dah hitam legam. Kilang mana entah yang buang bahan kimia. Jabatan Alam Sekitar tidur ke?
reason: Environmental pollution complaint about river contamination questioning environmental department's oversight.
suggested_rewrite: Pencemaran sungai perlu dilaporkan segera kepada JAS dengan bukti gambar. Kilang yang mencemari sungai boleh didenda di bawah Akta Kualiti Alam Sekeliling.

input_text: Why do we even have a consumer tribunal if complaints take years to resolve? The whole system is broken.
reason: Frustrated about slow consumer tribunal process, calling the system broken.
suggested_rewrite: The consumer tribunal process could be expedited with more resources and digital case management. Timely resolution builds consumer confidence.

input_text: Aku penat la dengan boss yang suka micromanage. Setiap benda nak kena check. Tak percaya pekerja langsung.
reason: Workplace frustration about micromanaging boss, feeling distrusted.
suggested_rewrite: Gaya pengurusan yang terlalu mengawal boleh menjejaskan produktiviti. Berbincang secara terbuka dengan pengurus tentang autonomi kerja boleh membantu.

input_text: 这个物业管理太差了。每个月收那么多管理费，游泳池永远是坏的。
reason: Frustrated about building management collecting high fees but pool always broken.
suggested_rewrite: 物业管理费应反映在设施维护上。业主可以在年会上要求审计管理费使用情况。

input_text: Dah berapa kali report longkang tersumbat tapi masih sama. Nyamuk bertelur kat situ, nanti denggi baru nak bertindak.
reason: Frustrated about blocked drains causing dengue risk, repeated ignored complaints.
suggested_rewrite: Longkang tersumbat meningkatkan risiko denggi. Aduan bertulis dengan gambar kepada PBT perlu dibuat untuk rekod dan tindakan susulan.

input_text: Mechanic charged me triple the normal price because I'm a woman. So unfair and dishonest.
reason: Alleging gender-based price discrimination by mechanic, consumer fraud complaint.
suggested_rewrite: Always get multiple quotes before car repairs. If you suspect overcharging, file a complaint with the Domestic Trade Ministry.

input_text: இந்த பகுதியில் திருட்டு அதிகமாகி வருகிறது. காவல்துறை என்ன செய்கிறது என்று தெரியவில்லை.
reason: Safety concern about increasing theft with frustration toward police inaction.
suggested_rewrite: திருட்டு அதிகரிப்பு குறித்து காவல்துறையிடம் முறையான புகார் அளிக்கவும். சமூக காவல் குழுக்களும் உதவும்.

input_text: TNB caj elektrik makin naik. Guna aircond sikit pun bill beratus. Memang nak bunuh rakyat ke?
reason: Exaggerated complaint about electricity bills, accusing utility of wanting to 'kill' the people.
suggested_rewrite: Kenaikan tarif elektrik membebankan isi rumah. Kerajaan perlu mempertimbangkan tarif berperingkat yang melindungi pengguna berpendapatan rendah.

input_text: Online shopping in Malaysia is a scam. Half the products are fake and sellers just disappear after taking your money.
reason: Sweeping generalization about online shopping being a scam, frustrated consumer.
suggested_rewrite: Online shopping fraud is a concern. Buyers should use verified sellers, check reviews, and report scams to KPDNHEP or the platform's dispute center.

input_text: 每次下大雨，这个地区就发生闪电水灾。政府年年说要解决，但什么都没做。
reason: Recurring flash flood frustration criticizing government inaction year after year.
suggested_rewrite: 反复发生的闪电水灾需要长期的排水系统升级。居民可以联合向地方政府提交正式请愿书。

input_text: Kedai repair phone ni tipu la. Tukar spare part murah tapi caj macam original. Peniaga macam ni patut kena tutup.
reason: Accusing phone repair shop of fraud, wanting it shut down.
suggested_rewrite: Pengguna berhak mengetahui jenis alat ganti yang digunakan. Simpan resit dan minta pengesahan bertulis mengenai jenis spare part sebelum pembaikan.

input_text: The public park is so dirty and unkept. Broken equipment everywhere. Kids can get hurt. Nobody maintains anything in this country.
reason: Frustrated park maintenance complaint with sweeping country-level generalization.
suggested_rewrite: The park's broken equipment poses safety risks for children. I'll report the specific hazards to the local council for urgent maintenance.

input_text: 这里的诊所医生每次都随便看看就开药。根本不认真检查。病人的命不值钱吗？
reason: Frustrated about perceived careless medical treatment at clinics.
suggested_rewrite: 患者有权获得彻底的医疗检查。如果对诊断不满意，可以寻求第二意见或向医药理事会投诉。

input_text: Lepas renovate rumah, contractor hilang macam tu je. Kerja tak siap, duit dah ambil. Memang penipu.
reason: Frustrated about contractor disappearing after partial renovation, calling them a fraud.
suggested_rewrite: Kontraktor yang tidak menyiapkan kerja boleh dilaporkan kepada Tribunal Tuntutan Pengguna. Pastikan semua perjanjian didokumentasikan secara bertulis.

input_text: ஏன் இந்த நகரத்தில் நல்ல சாலைகள் இல்லை? வரி பணம் எல்லாம் எங்கே போகிறது?
reason: Questioning where tax money goes when roads are in poor condition.
suggested_rewrite: சாலை பராமரிப்புக்கு போதுமான நிதி ஒதுக்கீடு அவசியம். நகராட்சியிடம் சாலை நிலை குறித்து முறையாக புகார் செய்யலாம்.

input_text: KWSP money also government want to use. People's retirement fund, not your piggy bank la.
reason: Frustrated criticism of perceived government use of EPF funds, retirement security anxiety.
suggested_rewrite: EPF funds are workers' retirement savings that must be protected. Any policy changes affecting EPF should undergo thorough public consultation.

input_text: Pemandu lori ni memang bawa macam samseng. Highway pun diorang nak dominate. Satu hari nanti accident besar baru tau.
reason: Frustrated about aggressive truck drivers on highways, predicting accidents.
suggested_rewrite: Keselamatan jalan raya memerlukan penguatkuasaan had laju lori yang lebih ketat dan penempatan kamera kelajuan di lebuh raya.

input_text: Insurance company always find excuse not to pay claims. You pay premiums for years and when you need it, suddenly not covered.
reason: Frustrated about insurance claim rejections after paying premiums, consumer distrust.
suggested_rewrite: Insurance claim disputes can be escalated to Bank Negara's BNMTELELINK or the Financial Ombudsman. Keep all documentation for your claim.

input_text: 中学生压力太大了，每天做功课到半夜。教育部不关心学生的心理健康吗？
reason: Concern about student mental health due to excessive homework, criticizing education ministry.
suggested_rewrite: 学生的心理健康与学业同样重要。教育部应该评估课业量并为学生提供心理辅导服务。

input_text: Nak dapatkan MyKad pun susah. Kena tunggu berbulan-bulan. JPN ni memang slow sangat.
reason: Frustrated about long wait for national ID card, criticizing JPN efficiency.
suggested_rewrite: Proses pengeluaran MyKad boleh dipercepatkan dengan lebih banyak pusat perkhidmatan dan pilihan permohonan dalam talian.

input_text: Clinic queue from 6am but doctor only arrives at 9. Then break at 12. What kind of healthcare is this?
reason: Frustrated about healthcare queuing vs doctor availability, sarcastic tone.
suggested_rewrite: Healthcare appointment systems could reduce wait times by scheduling patients in time slots rather than requiring early morning queueing.

input_text: Makanan kat kantin hospital ni macam takde rasa. Orang sakit pun kena makan benda tak sedap. Kesian betul.
reason: Complaining about bland hospital canteen food quality for patients.
suggested_rewrite: Kualiti makanan di kantin hospital penting untuk pemulihan pesakit. Maklum balas kepada pentadbiran hospital boleh membantu meningkatkan menu.

input_text: 这些非法停车的人太自私了。堵住整条路不管别人。执法部门在哪里？
reason: Frustrated about illegal parking blocking roads and lack of enforcement.
suggested_rewrite: 非法停车影响交通流通和紧急车辆通行。市民可以通过地方政府应用程序举报违规停车。
